'''Polneye''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Farlax sector/Legends|Farlax sector]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. Polneye was established under the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as a [[Grannan]] colony. It was then [[Battle of Polneye|taken over]] by the [[Yevetha]] during the [[Yevethan Purge]] in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]], and later admitted as an empty world to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] as a memorial to the Yevethan atrocities.

[[Plat Mallar]] was the sole survivor.

{{Planet-stub}}
